_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology

_contextSnippet: We evaluated drug response to 'robust' or 'good' microtissues, namely MN-2, JH-2-002, JH-2-079-c, and WU-225. Drug response ex vivo predicted drug response in vivo.
details: JH-2-079-c PDX assembled into 3D microtissues with good viability (>50% at 48 h); proceeded to ex vivo drug response testing with trabectedin, mirdametinib (MEK inhibitor), and olaparib (PARP inhibitor) as single agents and combinations; responded least to all three drugs among the tested PDX; also exhibited a dramatic reduction in cell viability after five days in culture; only PDX in this study derived from a recurrent tumor
